books.title: Harry Potter
books.description: Harry Potter is a young wizard who discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry where he faces many adventures.

books.title: A Quest of Heroe
books.description: A Quest of Heroes is an epic coming-of-age fantasy following 14-year-old Thorgrin. Outcast by his family, he defies his father to join the Kingâ€™s Legion, discovers mysterious magical powers, and gets entangled in forbidden romance and political intrigue.

books.title: The Goldfinch
books.description: A boy in New York is taken in by a wealthy family after his mother is killed in a bombing at the Metropolitan Museum of Art. In a rush of panic, he steals 'The Goldfinch', a painting that eventually draws him into a world of crime.

books.title: The Hunger Games
books.description: Winning means fame and fortune. Losing means certain death. The Hunger Games have begun. . . .

books.title: Furiously Happy
books.description: A humor memoir tinged with just enough tragedy and pathos to make it worthwhile, Jenny Lawson examines her own experience with severe depression.

books.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
books.description: A hilarious, absurdist sci-fi classic that follows an ordinary human as he travels across the universe after Earth is destroyed to make way for a hyperspace bypass.

books.title: A Confederacy of Dunces by John Kennedy Toole
books.description: A posthumous Pulitzer Prize-winning masterpiece that follows Ignatius J. Reilly, a hilarious and eccentric eccentric through New Orleans.

books.title: Me Talk Pretty One Day
books.description: A brilliant collection of autobiographical essays where the author recounts his awkward youth and the hilarious struggles of moving to France as an adult and attempting to learn French.
